cases.title: AuditOnManualEdit: AttendanceService.manualEdit persists append-only AttendanceAuditLog with actor, before/after status, and timestamp
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with Closed session closedAt within 24 h of TestClock
attendance_records row with status Absent for known studentId and sessionId
AttendanceService wired with AttendanceRecordRepository and audit writer per attendance module
Editor context: assigned Instructor userId
steps: Record beforeState: attendance_records.status Absent
Invoke AttendanceService.manualEdit(recordId, Present, editorId, note) under Instructor context
Query attendance_audit_logs filtered by attendance_record_id and assert exactly one new row
Assert audit row fields: editor_id (actor), previous_status Absent, new_status Present, note, edited_at timestamp per error-handling §6.2 AttendanceManualEdit
Attempt UPDATE on the audit row via SQL and assert application policy or trigger rejects mutation
Assert no prior audit rows for same record were modified (append-only)
cases.expected: NFR-15 target: 100% manual attendance edits produce append-only audit record with actor ID, timestamp, and before/after action detail per testing-plan §5 AuditOnManualEdit

cases.title: ExportAuditLog: ExportService.exportCsv writes audit entry with actor, filter params, and row count in PostgreSQL
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Closed sessions and attendance records for HESD-01 / SWE-101 date range
ExportService wired with reporting-export module and export_audit_logs table
TrainingOfficeAdmin userId available as actor context
steps: Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from, to }, adminId)
Assert CSV stream returned with expected row count N
Query export_audit_logs and assert exactly one new row for this export
Assert audit fields: actor_id adminId, filter_summary matching request params, row_count N, exported_at timestamp per error-handling §6.2 ExportAuditLog
Assert audit row is append-only (no UPDATE on prior export audit rows)
cases.expected: NFR-15 target: successful CSV export creates ExportAuditLog with actor, filter params, and row count per testing-plan §5 ExportAuditLog and roles-permissions §2.6

cases.title: TokenReuseAlert: consumed QR token second submission writes security audit with session, token, and student IDs
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and QrToken in Consumed state from Student A successful check-in
CheckInService wired with security audit writer per check-in module
Student B enrolled in same session with valid GPS coords
steps: Student B submits POST check-in with same consumed tokenId within 30-second validity window
Assert check-in rejected with domain outcome indicating token reuse
Query security_audit_logs (or equivalent) for event type TokenReuseAlert
Assert audit entry contains session_id, token_id, first_student_id (Student A), submitting_student_id (Student B), and timestamp
Assert no second Present record created for Student B
cases.expected: NFR-15 target: token reuse alert produces append-only security audit with session, token, and student IDs per BR-11, AC-09b, and error-handling §6.2 TokenReuseAlert

cases.title: SpoofFlagged: SpoofSuspected check-in outcome writes security audit with heuristic signals and no raw coordinates
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and valid QR token
CheckInService with spoof heuristics enabled per FR-10
Student enrolled with device mockLocation=true or abnormally perfect accuracy fixture
steps: Student submits check-in with spoof-triggering device signals
Assert check-in rejected with outcome SpoofSuspected and attendance remains Pending or Rejected per AC-10a
Query security_audit_logs for event type SpoofFlagged
Assert audit entry contains session_id, student_id, heuristic_signals summary, and timestamp
Assert audit payload does NOT contain raw latitude or longitude values per NFR-12 and error-handling §6.2
cases.expected: NFR-15 target: SpoofSuspected outcome produces SpoofFlagged append-only audit with session, student, and heuristic signals — never raw coords per AC-10c

cases.title: TS-30: Instructor manual edit within 24 h produces AttendanceAuditLog with actor, timestamp, and status transition
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Closed session closedAt 2 hours before TestClock
Assigned Instructor authenticated with attendance:write
Student attendance record with status Absent
steps: PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId { status: Present, note: "Xác minh trực tiếp" } using Instructor session
Assert HTTP 200 and attendance status Present
Query attendance_audit_logs and assert entry with editorId Instructor, previousStatus Absent, newStatus Present, editedAt timestamp
Verify 100% of successful manual edits in TS-30 sample produce audit rows
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-30: status updated and audit log created with actor ID, timestamp, and action detail per NFR-15 and AC-11a

cases.title: TS-33: TrainingOfficeAdmin CSV export creates ExportAuditLog with actor, filterSummary, and rowCount
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with report:export
Closed sessions with attendance data for HESD-01 / SWE-101 in June 2026
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with filter body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 }
Assert HTTP 200 with text/csv response and parse row count N
Query export_audit_logs and assert entry with actor adminId, filterSummary matching request, rowCount N, exportedAt timestamp
Assert no export succeeds without corresponding audit row
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-33: admin CSV export 100% audit-logged with actor, filter params, and row count per NFR-15 and AC-13a

cases.title: TS-32 / Flow D: denied exports audit-logged; instructor in-scope and admin success exports produce ExportAuditLog
preconditions: Attendance data for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and HESD-02 / SWE-102
Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
Authenticated Student and TrainingOfficeAdmin sessions
steps: Student POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed with message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per AC-13b
Query security_audit_logs and assert ExportDenied entry for student actor
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 and assert HTTP 200 text/csv per AC-13c
Query export_audit_logs and assert ExportAuditLog success row for instructor actor with filterSummary and rowCount
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden (Flow D step 3 out-of-scope export)
Query security_audit_logs and assert ExportDenied entry for instructor out-of-scope attempt
TrainingOfficeAdmin POST /api/v1/reports/export with institution-wide filters and assert HTTP 200 with ExportAuditLog success row
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-32 and §6 Flow D: 100% denied export attempts produce ExportDenied audit; successful instructor in-scope and admin exports produce ExportAuditLog per NFR-15, BR-09, AC-13b, and AC-13c

cases.title: Flow C: manual fallback edit verifies audit log actor, timestamps, and admin override audit trail
preconditions: Closed session with Pending students transitioned to Absent
TestClock within 24 h of closedAt for instructor edit; separate fixture at 25 h for denial
TrainingOfficeAdmin account available
steps: Instructor marks student Present with note within 24 h and verify AttendanceAuditLog actor and before/after status
Advance clock to 25 h; Instructor edit attempt returns 403 EditWindowExpired with no new audit row
TrainingOfficeAdmin PATCH same record to Present with note
Assert HTTP 200 and admin audit entry with editorId, previousStatus, newStatus, timestamp
Confirm Flow C steps 2–5 audit verification per testing-plan §6
cases.expected: Flow C NFR-15 accountability: successful edits audit-logged; blocked instructor edit produces no false audit; admin override fully logged per testing-plan §6 Flow C

cases.title: Flow B step 4: second student same consumed token rejected with TokenReuseAlert security audit
preconditions: Active session with valid QR token
Student A checked in successfully consuming token
Student B enrolled with valid GPS inside radius
steps: Student A retries check-in and receives DuplicateCheckIn (no duplicate audit event type confusion)
Student B submits same consumed token within validity window
Assert check-in rejected for Student B
Query security audit and assert TokenReuseAlert with sessionId, tokenId, Student A and Student B IDs
Confirm Flow B step 4 security log per testing-plan §6 and AC-10c
cases.expected: Flow B anti-fraud path: token reuse produces append-only TokenReuseAlert audit per NFR-15 and BR-11

cases.title: PATCH /attendance/:recordId HTTP 200 success contract includes AttendanceAuditLog side effect
preconditions: Authenticated assigned Instructor session
Closed session within 24 h edit window
Known attendance recordId with status Absent
steps: Send PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId { status: Present, note: "Ghi chú điểm danh" }
Assert HTTP status 200 OK with updated AttendanceRecord envelope per API design §7.2
Query attendance_audit_logs for attendance_record_id and assert one new row linked to PATCH actor
Assert audit created_at within seconds of HTTP response timestamp
cases.expected: HTTP 200 PATCH /attendance/:recordId always writes AttendanceManualEdit audit per API design §7.2 and NFR-15 100% coverage target

cases.title: POST /reports/export HTTP 200 CSV response contract includes ExportAuditLog side effect
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Attendance records exist for export filter scope
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body
Assert HTTP 200, Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8, and Content-Disposition attachment per API design §8.3
Query export_audit_logs and assert ExportAuditLog row for this actor and filter within same request window
Assert row_count in audit matches CSV data row count
cases.expected: HTTP 200 POST /reports/export always writes ExportAuditLog per API design §8.3 and NFR-15 accountability measure

cases.title: Student and out-of-scope instructor export denied with ExportDenied audit; in-scope instructor produces ExportAuditLog
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with export-eligible attendance data for assigned and unassigned class-subjects
Authenticated Student session lacking report:export per roles-permissions §2.2
Security audit writer enabled for denied export attempts
steps: Student POST /api/v1/reports/export with any valid filter body and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed with message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu before CSV generation per AC-13b
Query security_audit_logs for ExportDenied with actor studentId and reason ExportNotAllowed
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 filter and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
Query security_audit_logs for ExportDenied with actor instructorAId and denial reason
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 filter and assert HTTP 200 text/csv per AC-13c
Query export_audit_logs and assert ExportAuditLog success row for instructor in-scope export — not ExportDenied
cases.expected: NFR-15: 100% denied export attempts (student, out-of-scope instructor) produce ExportDenied security audit; successful instructor in-scope export produces ExportAuditLog per BR-09 and API design §8.3

cases.title: EditWindowExpired instructor PATCH produces no AttendanceAuditLog; denied student export still audits
preconditions: Closed session with closedAt 25 hours before TestClock
Assigned Instructor with attendance:write
Authenticated Student session for export denial contrast test
steps: Instructor PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId { status: Present } and assert HTTP 403 EditWindowExpired
Query attendance_audit_logs and assert zero new rows for this failed attempt
Student POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body and assert HTTP 403 ExportNotAllowed
Query security_audit_logs and assert ExportDenied row created for student export denial
Contrast NFR-15 listed actions: failed manual edit not in audit scope; denied export always logged
cases.expected: Boundary: EditWindowExpired blocks edit without audit pollution; ExportDenied still 100% logged per NFR-15 sensitive-action list and error-handling §6.2

cases.title: AttendanceManualEdit audit captures beforeState and afterState for each permitted status transition including spoof override
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Closed session within instructor edit window
Attendance records with beforeState Absent, Rejected, and Excused on separate rows
AttendanceService.manualEdit callable with Instructor editorId
steps: Transition Absent → Present and assert audit previous_status Absent, new_status Present
Transition Rejected → Present (spoof override per BR-10) and assert audit captures Rejected → Present
Transition Present → Excused with note and assert audit beforeState Present, afterState Excused
Assert each transition creates distinct append-only audit row with editor_id and edited_at
cases.expected: NFR-15 action detail: every successful manual edit audit records beforeState and afterState per error-handling §6.2 AttendanceManualEdit fields

cases.title: AttendanceAuditTrail panel displays editor, timestamp, from→to status, and note after manual edit
preconditions: Instructor logged in via Playwright; session roster page /sessions/:sessionId/roster loaded
Closed session within 24 h edit window with student row status Absent
AttendanceEditDialog and AttendanceAuditTrail components per ui-ux/07-event-specific-components.md §4.2–4.3
steps: Open row action Chỉnh sửa and submit AttendanceEditDialog with status Present and note
Assert success toast and roster row updates to Present StatusBadge
Expand AttendanceAuditTrail on edited row
Assert panel shows editor display name, edited timestamp, from Absent → to Present, and submitted note in Vietnamese UI
Assert audit trail is read-only with no edit or delete controls
cases.expected: Browser journey: instructor-visible audit trail reflects append-only AttendanceAuditLog per NFR-15, ui-ux/07-event-specific-components.md AttendanceAuditTrail §4.3, and AC-11a accountability

cases.title: Instructor inline Xuất CSV on /reports audit-logged; student denied; admin /admin/export and inline export succeed with audit
preconditions: Instructor authenticated with ClassAssignment to HESD-01 / SWE-101; instructor chrome omits /admin/* nav per roles-permissions §2.3a and ui-ux/06-app-layout-components.md §5.3
Student authenticated session; no export control visible on report pages per AC-13b
TrainingOfficeAdmin session on /admin/export and /admin/reports with ReportFilterBar per ui-states §12
Export audit data seeded for admin and instructor filter scopes
steps: As Instructor on /reports with assigned filters, assert SidebarNav contains zero href matching /admin/* and no Xuất CSV nav item for /admin/export
Assert page header or toolbar displays Xuất CSV button using current filter state per AC-12d before export
Click inline Xuất CSV on /reports and assert scoped CSV download per AC-13c
Query export_audit_logs and assert ExportAuditLog row for instructor actor, filter params, and row count
As Student, attempt export via API or hidden control and assert 403 ExportNotAllowed with ExportDenied security audit; verify no CSV download
As Instructor navigate directly to /admin/export and assert ForbiddenPage without CSV download
As TrainingOfficeAdmin on /admin/reports, click inline Xuất CSV per AC-13d and assert CSV download with ExportAuditLog for on-screen filters
As TrainingOfficeAdmin on /admin/export, apply filters and click Xuất CSV; assert download and ExportAuditLog row
cases.expected: Browser journey: instructor scoped inline export audit-logged on /reports with AC-12d toolbar Xuất CSV; student export denied with ExportDenied audit; admin inline and dedicated export both produce NFR-15 ExportAuditLog per AC-13a, AC-13c, and AC-13d

cases.title: Append-only invariant: security audit rows for SpoofFlagged and TokenReuseAlert cannot be updated or deleted
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with existing SpoofFlagged and TokenReuseAlert audit rows from prior integration tests
Application or DB policy enforcing append-only on security_audit_logs and attendance_audit_logs
steps: Attempt UPDATE on SpoofFlagged audit row via repository or raw SQL
Assert operation rejected or has no effect on stored fields
Attempt DELETE on TokenReuseAlert audit row
Assert operation rejected or row count unchanged
Repeat for AttendanceAuditLog and ExportAuditLog tables
cases.expected: NFR-15 append-only guarantee: all listed sensitive-action audit entities resist mutation after creation per 07-non-functional-risk §2.3 NFR-15 target

cases.title: Instructor scoped ExportService.exportCsv writes ExportAuditLog with actor, filter params, and row count
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with attendance for HESD-01 / SWE-101 (assigned) and HESD-02 / SWE-102 (unassigned)
Instructor userId with ClassAssignment to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
ExportService enforces BR-08 assignment scope per API design §8.3
steps: Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from, to }, instructorId) for assigned pair
Assert CSV stream returned with scoped row count N containing only HESD-01 / SWE-101 data
Query export_audit_logs and assert exactly one new ExportAuditLog row with actor_id instructorId, filter_summary matching request, row_count N
Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-02, subjectCode: SWE-102, from, to }, instructorId) for unassigned pair
Assert authorization failure with ExportDenied security audit and no ExportAuditLog success row
cases.expected: NFR-15 module boundary: instructor in-scope CSV export 100% audit-logged via ExportAuditLog; out-of-scope denial produces ExportDenied per BR-09, AC-13c, and error-handling §6.2

cases.title: POST /reports/export by assigned instructor HTTP 200 contract includes ExportAuditLog side effect
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Attendance records exist for HESD-01 / SWE-101 within export date range
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 200, Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8, and Content-Disposition attachment per API design §8.3
Parse CSV row count N and assert scoped data only for assigned class-subject per AC-13c
Query export_audit_logs and assert ExportAuditLog row with actor instructorAId, filterSummary, and rowCount N within same request window
cases.expected: HTTP 200 instructor in-scope POST /reports/export always writes ExportAuditLog per API design §8.3, BR-09, AC-13c, and NFR-15 100% coverage target

cases.title: SidebarNav and BottomNav omit unauthorized export nav items; non-admin chrome has zero /admin/* links
preconditions: Instructor authenticated on /sessions with ClassAssignment granting report:read
Student authenticated on /check-in with checkin:submit
TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated on /admin
usePermittedNav() filters nav descriptors per ui-ux/06-app-layout-components.md §6.2a
steps: As Instructor inspect SidebarNav DOM and assert zero anchor elements with href matching /admin/*
Assert SidebarNav renders Buổi học and Báo cáo only; Xuất CSV (/admin/export) and other admin nav labels absent from DOM not merely hidden
As Student inspect BottomNav and assert only Điểm danh and Lịch sử items present; zero /admin/* href values in student layout chrome
As Instructor on /reports verify inline Xuất CSV button present for scoped export per AC-13c
As TrainingOfficeAdmin on /admin verify SidebarNav includes Xuất CSV nav item linking to /admin/export
cases.expected: NFR-15 UI accountability: unauthorized export destinations omitted from nav chrome per BR-14 and AC-18a; instructor uses inline Xuất CSV on /reports for scoped audit-logged export; non-admin roles contain zero /admin/* layout nav links

cases.title: AC-10b: Instructor overrides SpoofSuspected attendance to Present with AttendanceManualEdit audit
preconditions: Closed session with student attendance record in Rejected status from prior SpoofSuspected check-in
Assigned Instructor authenticated with attendance:write within 24 h edit window
SpoofFlagged security audit row already exists for the student from check-in rejection
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and confirm student status Rejected from SpoofSuspected outcome
PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId { status: Present, note: "Xác minh trực tiếp sau nghi ngờ GPS" } using Instructor session
Assert HTTP 200 and attendance status Present per AC-10b
Query attendance_audit_logs and assert AttendanceManualEdit row with editorId Instructor, previousStatus Rejected, newStatus Present, note, and editedAt timestamp
Assert prior SpoofFlagged security audit row unchanged (append-only); no duplicate SpoofFlagged entry on manual override
cases.expected: AC-10b and NFR-15: instructor physical-verification override after SpoofSuspected produces append-only AttendanceManualEdit audit with actor, timestamp, and before/after status per error-handling §6.2
